value.found_quote: The models integrate into the Google ecosystem through the Gemini mobile app, which functions as an overlay assistant on Android devices, and through the Vertex AI platform for third-party developers.
value.rationale: The page describes the Gemini app developed by Google, including its launch on Android and iOS in February 2024 and its continued use, e.g., Gemini 3 Pro being made immediately available across the Gemini app. This substantiates the claim.
